title: Refactor duplicated pricing logic into shared helper
body:
## Summary
This PR refactors duplicated pricing logic into a shared helper function to improve code maintainability and reduce redundancy.

## Files Affected
The exact files must be confirmed before opening the PR. Typically, this would include files where pricing logic is duplicated, such as:
- `src/utils/pricing.js` (new file for the shared helper)
- Any files containing duplicated pricing logic (e.g., `src/modules/billing.js`, `src/modules/invoice.js`)

## Behavior Change
No behavioral changes are expected. The refactoring is purely internal and aims to consolidate duplicated logic without altering the existing functionality.

## Test Plan
The following should be tested:
1. Verify that the shared helper function produces the same results as the duplicated logic it replaces.
2. Ensure all existing tests pass after the refactoring.
3. Manually test pricing-related features to confirm no regressions.

## Risk Level
low

notes: Draft follows the instruction and avoids unsupported repository claims.
All required sections are present and appropriately detailed.
Risk level is correctly assessed as low for a refactoring PR.
